exploration_notes: All 4 files specified in the task confirmed locally. The call chain is: onDnsHostAddOrUpdate() -> addOrUpdateHost() -> updatePriorityState() -> PrioritySetImpl::updateHosts() -> MainPrioritySetImpl::updateCrossPriorityHostMap(). The memory leak is in addOrUpdateHost() which calls setNewAddresses() to update the LogicalHost's IP in-place without removing the old IP from the cross-priority host map maintained in upstream_impl.cc. The fix requires: (1) debug logging in updateCrossPriorityHostMap(),
